questions.explanation: wolf 的复数形式是 wolves，以 f/fe 结尾的名词变复数时，通常把 f/fe 改为 v 再加 es。
questions.sentence: 1. Every few minutes, one of the ______ (wolf) looks over at me.

questions.explanation: fox 的复数形式是 foxes，以 x 结尾的名词加 es。
questions.sentence: 2. There are three ______ (fox) in the zoo. They are from Europe.

questions.explanation: baby 的复数形式是 babies，以辅音字母 + y 结尾的名词，变 y 为 i 再加 es。
questions.sentence: 3. Mr. Zhang and his wife have two ______ (baby). They are twins.

questions.explanation: be careful 是固定搭配，意为'小心'，care 的形容词形式是 careful。
questions.sentence: 4. You should be ______ (care) and try not to fall down when you go downstairs.

questions.explanation: funny 是形容词，意为'有趣的'，修饰人。
questions.sentence: 5. My brother is very ______ (fun) and he often tells me jokes to make me laugh.

questions.explanation: 表示'第三课'要用序数词 third。
questions.sentence: 6. The ______ (three) lesson is very interesting.

questions.explanation: winner 是名词，意为'获胜者'，由动词 win 加 -er 构成。
questions.sentence: 7. She is the ______ (win) of the English competition.

questions.explanation: 修饰动词 listen 要用副词 carefully，意为'认真地'。
questions.sentence: 8. We should listen to our teachers ______ (careful).

questions.explanation: cloudy 是形容词，意为'多云的'，由 cloud 加 -y 构成。
questions.sentence: 9. It's ______ (cloud) today. It's going to rain.

questions.explanation: be interested in 是固定搭配，意为'对...感兴趣'。
questions.sentence: 10. My sister is ______ (interest) in drawing pictures.

questions.explanation: 根据句意'吃太多糖对牙齿不健康'，需要用 unhealthy，health 的形容词是 healthy，加 un- 构成反义词。
questions.sentence: 11. Eating too much sugar is ______ (health) for your teeth.

questions.explanation: 表示'一周两次'要用 twice，是频率副词。
questions.sentence: 12. My brother exercises ______ (two) a week to keep fit.

questions.explanation: 根据句意'她是我们班最好的学生'，需要用最高级 best。
questions.sentence: 13. She is the ______ (good) student in our class.

questions.explanation: even 修饰比较级，表示'甚至更糟'，所以用 worse。
questions.sentence: 14. The weather today is even ______ (bad) than yesterday.

questions.explanation: 修饰动词 are playing 要用副词 happily，意为'快乐地'。
questions.sentence: 15. Look! The children are playing ______ (happy) in the park.

questions.explanation: sandwich 是可数名词，前面有 two，要用复数形式 sandwiches。
questions.sentence: 16. I'd like to buy two ______ (sandwich).

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 book 要用形容词 interesting，意为'有趣的'。
questions.sentence: 17. —What an ______ (interest) book! —Yes, the book is really amazing.

questions.explanation: 情态动词 can 后面接动词原形，fly 本身就是原形。
questions.sentence: 18. They believe bees can ______ (fly) as far as 10 kilometers if necessary.

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 animal 要用形容词 dangerous，意为'危险的'。
questions.sentence: 19. I don't like the tiger. I think that it is a very ______ (danger) animal.

questions.explanation: 修饰动词 listens 要用副词 usually，意为'通常地'。
questions.sentence: 20. To relax, my father ______ (usual) listens to country music in his free time.

questions.explanation: woman 的复数形式是 women，是不规则变化，与 man/men 类似。句中 both...and... 连接两个并列成分，需要用复数形式。
questions.sentence: 21. Today, the Yingge dance has greeted both men and ______ (woman).

questions.explanation: child 的复数形式是 children，是不规则变化。句中 for parents and ______ 表示'为父母和孩子们'，需要用复数。
questions.sentence: 22. We organize many activities for parents and ______ (child).

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 movie 要用形容词 interesting，意为'有趣的'。这是一个感叹句，结构为 What an + 形容词 + 名词。
questions.sentence: 23. What an ______ (interest) movie it is! We all want to watch it again.

questions.explanation: or 连接并列成分，something bad 和 something dangerous 都是名词短语，需要用形容词 dangerous 修饰 something。
questions.sentence: 24. In this way, people can protect themselves from eating something bad or ______ (danger).

questions.explanation: 动词 swim 加上 -er 变成名词 swimmer，意为'游泳者、游泳运动员'。前面有形容词 famous 修饰，需要用名词形式。
questions.sentence: 25. Mike's brother is good at swimming and he hopes to become a famous ______ (swim).

questions.explanation: be lucky to do sth. 是固定搭配，意为'很幸运做某事'，需要用形容词 lucky。
questions.sentence: 26. We are ______ (luck) to have family and friends in our lives.

questions.explanation: be made of 是固定搭配，意为'由...制成'（看得出原材料），需要用过去分词 made 构成被动语态。
questions.sentence: 27. The kite is always ______ (make) of painted silk and bamboo.

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 flag 要用形容词 national，意为'国家的、国有的'，表示'国旗'。
questions.sentence: 28. This is our ______ (nation) flag and it is the symbol of our great country.

questions.explanation: warm and friendly 是并列结构，friendly 是形容词，意为'友好的'，与 warm 一起修饰 the online world。
questions.sentence: 29. Good sharing can make the online world warm and ______ (friend).

questions.explanation: 这是一个感叹句，结构为 What + 形容词 + 名词，需要用形容词 beautiful 修饰 flowers。
questions.sentence: 30. What ______ (beauty) flowers they are! I like them very much.

questions.explanation: 修饰动词 land 要用副词 safely，意为'安全地'。不定式 to land a plane safely 作目的状语。
questions.sentence: 31. For example, right now to land a plane ______ (safe), a pilot has to go through many steps in the right order.

questions.explanation: a lot of 后面接可数名词复数，build 的名词形式是 building，意为'建筑物'，这里需要用复数 buildings。
questions.sentence: 32. The city is modern and you can see a lot of tall ______ (build) in the centre of city.

questions.explanation: 根据后文'因为我找不到钱包'可知心情是不开心的，所以要用 happy 的反义词 unhappy，意为'不开心的'。
questions.sentence: 33. I'm very ______ (happy) because I can't find my wallet.

questions.explanation: practise doing sth. 是固定搭配，意为'练习做某事'，后面接动词的 -ing 形式，所以用 playing。
questions.sentence: 34. My sister has to practise ______ (play) the piano for two hours every day.

questions.explanation: than 是比较级的标志，good 的比较级是 better，意为'更好的'。
questions.sentence: 35. Don't think you are ______ (good) than others, or you will fall behind others.

questions.explanation: feel 是系动词，后面接形容词作表语，relaxed 意为'感到放松的'，形容人的感受。
questions.sentence: 36. —I'm nervous, Mom. What should I do? —Well, listening to your favourite music can help you feel ______ (relax).

questions.explanation: 根据句意'我每周去那里一次'，需要用频率副词 once，意为'一次'。句首字母大写。
questions.sentence: 37. "______ a week I go out there," she says.

questions.explanation: 根据后文'因为他对游泳不感兴趣'，可知他很少去游泳，需要用频率短语 hardly ever，意为'几乎从不'。
questions.sentence: 38. David ______ goes swimming because he is not interested in swimming.

questions.explanation: 根据后文'我总是喜欢球类运动'，可知前面列举的是球类运动，需要用 baseball，意为'棒球'。
questions.sentence: 39. My favourite sports are ______ and tennis. I always love ball games.

questions.explanation: 根据后文'你应该选择一个更短的'，可知前面说的是跳绳，需要用 jump rope，意为'跳绳'。
questions.sentence: 40. This ______ is too long for you, Lily. You should choose a shorter one.

questions.explanation: 根据句意'我爸爸每天跑步因为他想保持健康'，需要用 keep fit，意为'保持健康'。
questions.sentence: 41. My father goes running every day because he wants to ______.

questions.explanation: 根据答句'可能这是Jack的'，可知前面说的是'不是我的'，需要用名词性物主代词 mine，相当于 my notebook。
questions.sentence: 42. —Who left a notebook in the English club? —It's not ______ (my). Maybe it's Jack's.

questions.explanation: go jogging 是固定搭配，意为'去慢跑'，需要用 jog 的 -ing 形式。
questions.sentence: 43. —Let's go ______ (jog) tomorrow. —That sounds great.

questions.explanation: practice makes perfect 是英语谚语，意为'熟能生巧'。practise 是动词，这里需要用名词形式 practice。注意英美拼写差异，美式英语常用 practice 作为名词。
questions.sentence: 44. Li Ying believed that ______ (practise) makes perfect.

questions.explanation: 根据句意'我们都是青少年'，需要用 teenager 的复数形式 teenagers，意为'青少年'。teenage 是形容词，这里需要名词。
questions.sentence: 45. She is 15 years old. I am 14 years old. We both are ______ (teenage).

questions.explanation: go swimming 是固定搭配，意为'去游泳'，需要用 swim 的 -ing 形式。
questions.sentence: 46. Lily asks me to go ______ (swim) with her.

questions.explanation: keep us healthy 是固定搭配，healthy 是形容词，意为'健康的'，作宾语补足语。
questions.sentence: 47. Running and cycling are good sports and they can keep us ______ (health).

questions.explanation: It's fun for sb. to do sth. 是固定句型，意为'对某人来说做某事很有趣'，需要用动词不定式 to watch。
questions.sentence: 48. It's fun for the boys ______ (watch) football matches because they all love football.

questions.explanation: Both of his parents 是复数主语，谓语动词要用原形 work，表示'工作'。
questions.sentence: 49. Both of his parents ______ (work) at a local factory.

questions.explanation: some 后面接可数名词复数，strawberry 的复数形式是 strawberries，以辅音字母+y结尾，变 y 为 i 再加 es。
questions.sentence: 50. There are some ______ (strawberry) in the bag. They are very delicious.

questions.explanation: work as a waiter 意为'做服务员工作'，wait 加 -er 变成名词 waiter，意为'男服务员'。
questions.sentence: 51. David is a college student. He works as a ______ (wait) in a restaurant when he is free.

questions.explanation: What about doing sth.? 是固定句型，意为'做某事怎么样？'，about 是介词，后面接动词的 -ing 形式。
questions.sentence: 52. What about ______ (have) lunch together?

questions.explanation: a good choice 是名词短语，意为'一个好的选择'，需要用 choose 的名词形式 choice。
questions.sentence: 53. Getting close to nature is always a good ______ (choose).

questions.explanation: would like to do sth. 是固定搭配，意为'想要做某事'，后面接动词不定式 to order。
questions.sentence: 54. I'd like ______ (order) some beef noodles and milk.

questions.explanation: some 后面接可数名词复数，pear 的复数形式是 pears，直接加 s。
questions.sentence: 55. My mother goes to the store to buy some ______ (pear) and apples.

questions.explanation: a new service 是名词短语，意为'一项新服务'，需要用 serve 的名词形式 service。
questions.sentence: 56. China Railway is testing a new ______ (serve).

questions.explanation: instead of 是介词短语，后面接动词的 -ing 形式，意为'而不是做某事'。
questions.sentence: 57. They want to stay at home instead of ______ (go) to the zoo.

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 food 要用形容词 healthy，意为'健康的'。
questions.sentence: 58. My mother always asks me to eat more ______ (health) food.

questions.explanation: feel 是系动词，后面接形容词作表语，sleepy 意为'困倦的、想睡的'。
questions.sentence: 59. —Do you still feel ______ (sleep), David? —Yes, I do. I can't get enough sleep.

questions.explanation: make sb. do sth. 是固定搭配，意为'让某人做某事'，后面接动词原形 feel。
questions.sentence: 60. Walking for two hours makes me ______ (feel) very tired and I want to have a rest.

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 diet 要用形容词 balanced，意为'均衡的'，a balanced diet 是固定搭配，意为'均衡饮食'。
questions.sentence: 61. That means we'd better have a ______ (balance) diet and have three meals on time.

questions.explanation: the weight of... 是名词短语，意为'......的重量'，需要用 weigh 的名词形式 weight。
questions.sentence: 62. The ______ (weigh) of my coming baby made it difficult for me to stand straight, and my legs felt heavy.

questions.explanation: at the moment 意为'此刻、现在'，表示正在进行的动作，需要用现在进行时。主语 Lily and her friends 是复数，所以用 are having。
questions.sentence: 63. Lily and her friends ______ (have) a holiday in Qingdao at the moment.

questions.explanation: have fun doing sth. 是固定搭配，意为'做某事很开心'，后面接动词的 -ing 形式。
questions.sentence: 64. The children are having fun ______ (play) in the water.

questions.explanation: It's wise to do sth. 是固定句型，意为'做某事是明智的'，需要用动词不定式 to make。
questions.sentence: 65. It's wise ______ (make) a shopping list first.

questions.explanation: a lot of 后面接可数名词复数，tour 加 -ist 变成名词 tourist，意为'游客'，这里需要用复数形式 tourists。
questions.sentence: 66. A lot of ______ (tour) come to Beijing and visit the Great Wall every day.

questions.explanation: a bus driver 是名词短语，意为'公交车司机'，drive 加 -r 变成名词 driver。
questions.sentence: 67. His father is a bus ______ (drive) and he works hard to give him a better life.

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 part 要用形容词 central，意为'中心的、中央的'，表示'市中心部分'。
questions.sentence: 68. The school is not far away from here. It is in the ______ (center) part of the city.

questions.explanation: 修饰动词 die 要用副词 slowly，意为'慢慢地'。and 连接并列的动词短语，前面是 eat less and less，后面是 slowly die。
questions.sentence: 69. If a sea animal eats plastics by mistake, it will eat less and less and ______ (slow) die.

questions.explanation: Look! 是现在进行时的标志，表示正在发生的动作，需要用 shine 的现在分词 shining。
questions.sentence: 70. Look! The sun is ______ (shine).

questions.explanation: 主语 Everyone 是不定代词，视为单数，谓语动词要用第三人称单数形式 is。
questions.sentence: 71. Everyone here ______ (be) kind and friendly. They are always ready to help others.

questions.explanation: on the first floor 是固定表达，意为'在一楼'，需要用序数词 first。
questions.sentence: 72. On the ______ (one) floor, there are three rooms. Mine is the second one.

questions.explanation: Listen! 是现在进行时的标志，表示正在发生的动作，主语 My sister 是第三人称单数，需要用 is playing。
questions.sentence: 73. Listen! My sister ______ (play) the piano.

questions.explanation: that white building 是名词短语，意为'那座白色的建筑物'，需要用 build 的名词形式 building。
questions.sentence: 74. Look at that white ______ (build). My father's office is on its tenth floor.

questions.explanation: be 动词后面接形容词作表语，cloud 的形容词形式是 cloudy，意为'多云的'。
questions.sentence: 75. It will be ______ (cloud), so there won't be a burning sun.

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 day 要用形容词 stormy，意为'有暴风雨的'。
questions.sentence: 76. It is a ______ (storm) day today. You'd better not go out.

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 day 要用形容词 sunny，意为'晴朗的、阳光明媚的'。
questions.sentence: 77. The light in a house is usually about 100 times less than that outside on a ______ (sun) day.

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 days 要用形容词 windy，意为'有风的'。
questions.sentence: 78. I love spring most because I can fly a kite on ______ (wind) days.

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 part 要用形容词 northern，意为'北部的'，表示'中国的北部地区'。
questions.sentence: 79. Shanxi is a province that lies in the ______ (north) part of China.

questions.explanation: be lucky enough 是固定搭配，意为'足够幸运'，需要用形容词 lucky。
questions.sentence: 80. If someone else can help, we'll be ______ (luck) enough.

questions.explanation: 修饰动词 goes 要用副词 usually，意为'通常地'，表示习惯性动作。
questions.sentence: 81. David's father is healthy. He ______ (usual) goes running every morning.

questions.explanation: Look! 是现在进行时的标志，表示正在发生的动作，主语 The boy 是第三人称单数，需要用 is playing。
questions.sentence: 82. Look! The boy ______ (play) volleyball with his elder brother.

questions.explanation: 修饰动词 raining 要用副词 heavily，意为'大量地、猛烈地'，表示雨下得大。
questions.sentence: 83. It's raining ______ (heavy). You will get wet if you go out.

questions.explanation: What's the height of...? 是询问高度的常用表达，需要用名词 height，意为'高度'。
questions.sentence: 84. — What's the ______ (high) of the man? — He is about 178 cm.

questions.explanation: 主语 She 是第三人称单数，often 表示经常性动作，需要用一般现在时的第三人称单数形式 goes。
questions.sentence: 85. She often ______ (go) on tours with Traveleyes, a company that takes tourists traveling around the world.

questions.explanation: Look! 和 at the moment 都是现在进行时的标志，表示正在发生的动作，主语 The girl 是第三人称单数，需要用 is playing。
questions.sentence: 86. Look! The girl ______ (play) with her pet dog at the moment.

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 clothes 要用形容词 colourful，意为'色彩鲜艳的、多彩的'。
questions.sentence: 87. The old lady is my grandma and she loves to wear ______ (colour) clothes.

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 conditions 要用形容词 freezing，意为'极冷的、冰冻的'。
questions.sentence: 88. The poor workers have to work in ______ (freeze) conditions. They feel so cold and can't help trembling.

questions.explanation: be 动词后面接形容词作表语，snow 的形容词形式是 snowy，意为'下雪的、多雪的'。
questions.sentence: 89. I like winter best because it's often ______ (snow) everywhere.

questions.explanation: be 动词后面接形容词作表语，cloud 的形容词形式是 cloudy，意为'多云的'。
questions.sentence: 90. It is ______ (cloud) today. Let's go to the nearest park and take a walk there.

questions.explanation: be 动词后面接形容词作表语，fog 的形容词形式是 foggy，意为'多雾的'，注意双写 g。
questions.sentence: 91. The city is very ______ (fog), so we call it "City of Fog".

questions.explanation: encourage sb. to do sth. 是固定搭配，意为'鼓励某人做某事'，需要用动词不定式 to read。
questions.sentence: 92. My Chinese teacher encourages us ______ (read) some great classics.

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 work 要用形容词 tiring，意为'令人疲倦的'，表示工作本身的性质。
questions.sentence: 93. Last weekend, I went camping after a long time of ______ (tire) work.

questions.explanation: in high spirits 是固定短语，意为'情绪高涨、兴高采烈'，spirit 需要用复数形式 spirits。
questions.sentence: 94. All the children are in high ______ (spirit). Every one of them is very happy.

questions.explanation: some 后面接可数名词复数，leaf 的复数形式是 leaves，以 f/fe 结尾的名词变复数时，通常把 f/fe 改为 v 再加 es。
questions.sentence: 95. It's getting cold and some ______ (leaf) start to fall off the trees.

questions.explanation: enjoy doing sth. 是固定搭配，意为'喜欢做某事'，后面接动词的 -ing 形式。
questions.sentence: 96. This is my brother and he enjoys ______ (collect) stamps and coins.

questions.explanation: 修饰动词 made 要用副词 finally，意为'最终、终于'，表示结果。
questions.sentence: 97. I kept trying and ______ (final) I made it!

questions.explanation: It takes sb. time to do sth. 是固定句型，意为'做某事花费某人多长时间'，需要用动词不定式 to finish。
questions.sentence: 98. It usually takes my sister an hour ______ (finish) her homework.

questions.explanation: 修饰动词 remember 要用副词 certainly，意为'肯定地、当然'，表示确定。
questions.sentence: 99. I ______ (certain) remember this trip. We had great fun and learned a lot during the trip.

questions.explanation: some 后面接可数名词复数，diary 的复数形式是 diaries，以辅音字母+y结尾，变 y 为 i 再加 es。
questions.sentence: 100. When I stayed in the village, I wrote some ______ (diary) about my everyday life.

questions.explanation: last year 是过去时间状语，需要用一般过去时，动词 receive 要用过去式 received。
questions.sentence: 101. It ______ (receive) 1.9 million visitors last year.

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 school trip 要用形容词 amazing，意为'令人惊奇的、极好的'，表示事物本身的性质。
questions.sentence: 102. The students had an ______ (amaze) school trip last weekend.

questions.explanation: 修饰形容词 good 要用副词 really，意为'真正地、非常'，表示程度。
questions.sentence: 103. Lily, you are ______ (real) good at dancing. But you just pay attention to your own dance.
